{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220430163F80B12141F566445C04"}"},"total":1554},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7508248321737376536","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，视角新颖，从盘老板变成了被盘的[笑][笑][笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748153481,"group_id":"7502080457551399998","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N32uL4UV5kitZ+Dtp7+asTI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aa8057ee7a3d41a8a07c2d43d06c73a9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710612&x-signature=0e3HLXqfmBCVwUOhCOUCmf6ySCo%3D","user_id":"18903948679","user_name":"柴大点"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"18903948679","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7502080457551399998","book_info":{"abstract":"【垂钓+水库+系统+巨物暴走+人类发癫实录】
沈浪接手老家水库的第一天，鱼护里只蹦跶着几条蔫巴的小鲫鱼。
三天后，整个钓鱼界炸了——
这水库的鱼，钓上来才是疯狂的开始！

美女焊死油门，用挖掘机铲斗当鱼护，拽出的鲤鱼鳞片大如井盖；
富豪开着游艇撒钞票打窝，赌咒要钓起“能撞翻巡逻艇的活体鱼雷”；
钓鱼佬们边甩竿边骂娘：“三百斤？那叫开胃菜！老子要和那条能把钓竿甩出火星子的祖宗对线！！”

鱼护焊成铁皮棺材，钓线换成钢索缆绳，无人机拍到更离谱的场面——
新手被鱼拖成“水上漂”，踩着浪尖嚎“这货是吞了金坷垃吧！”，
老餮把钓竿焊死在渣土车上，轮胎烧焦的糊味里，弹幕疯狂刷屏：“松手！这鱼要跃龙门了！！”

水产局的人拎着检测仪骂骂咧咧：“你这水库绝对投了黑科技！”
沈浪蹲在监控室嚼辣条，瞥了眼只有他能见的提示——
水面下的黑影正无声膨胀，而钓客们踩着淤泥嘶吼：
“放闸！老子今天要钓条能上热搜的！”

毕竟当鱼鳍割裂晨雾时，谁还在乎科学？
——下一竿，是爆护，还是爆肝？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6d9f95de942e13a33f3f43fa829b7e26","author":"此琊","author_id":"","book_id":"7502080457551399998","book_name":"垂钓巨物？抱歉我的水库有亿点猛","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7502080549146608190","read_count":"29419","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1161155"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"520","tags":"都市种田,都市,系统,钓鱼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b9379354aac552b66af5f02511ff4a54~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309016&x-signature=kKUuweiSMbw%2BYocGaDzBGdHcatg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1393820323820968","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"21"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220430163F80B12141F566445C04"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3027,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5887,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":10293},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7528075257691177752","co ommon":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书《鱼获万倍成长！钓鱼佬们都疯了！》确实非常吸引人。首先，它的标题就极具吸引力，让人一眼就能感受到故事的趣味性和独特性。书籍简介提到这是一个关于垂钓、水库系统与巨物暴走的故事，充满了冒险和惊喜，能够迅速抓住读者的兴趣。

此外，该书在平台上的评分高达8.0分，并且有超过50.8万人正在阅读，这充分说明它受到了广大读者的喜爱和认可。书中描述的情节生动有趣，能够让读者仿佛身临其境，体验到钓鱼带来的乐趣和挑战。

从标签来看，“都市种田”、“乡村”、“钓鱼”等元素结合在一起，创造了一个丰富多样的故事背景，既有都市生活的现代感，又有乡村自然的宁静美好，这样的设定使得故事更加立体和饱满。

总的来说，《鱼获万倍成长！钓鱼佬们都疯了！》不仅内容精彩，而且得到了众多读者的好评，是一本值得细细品味的好书。无论是对钓鱼感兴趣的读者，还是喜欢轻松愉快故事的朋友，都能在这本书中找到不少乐趣。","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":11,"text":"钓鱼佬","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%92%93%E9%B1%BC%E4%BD%AC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177412501666445C04%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227511172439089218329%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227502080457551399998%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%92%93%E9%B1%BC%E4%BD%AC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748835497,"group_id":"7502080457551399998","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5JMgvVyt5wrJShwUVoagxFcDDOdafcMRpPAdKuBUvlT","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3314376034752073","user_name":"爱吃猪血粉丝的诸葛青"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3314376034752073","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7502080457551399998","book_info":{"abstract":"【垂钓+水库+系统+巨物暴走+人类发癫实录】
